zh.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne是Hugo II van Voorne和Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck的兒子，於1108年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫卡洛。他於1136年與Hadewich van Holland在荷蘭霍蘭奧斯特賀內結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1156年6月25日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫瓦雷格姆貝福倫勒享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne是Hugo II van Voorne和Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck的儿子，于1108年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫卡洛。他于1136年与Hadewich van Holland在荷兰霍蘭奧斯特賀內结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1156年6月25日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫瓦雷格姆貝福倫勒享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hugo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of   Hugh  , used throughout the Middle Ages in official documents, and now enjoying a revival as a given name.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne was born in 1108, in Kallo, East Flanders, Belgium as the son of Hugo II van Voorne and Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck. He married Hadewich van Holland in 1136, in Oostvoorne, Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 June 1156, in Beveren-Leie, Waregem, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne est né en 1108, à Kallo, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, fils de Hugo II van Voorne et Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck. Il a épousé Hadewich van Holland en 1136, à Oostvoorne, Holland, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1156, à Beveren, Waregem, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne wurde 1108 in Kallo, Ostflandern, Belgien, als Sohn von Hugo II van Voorne und Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck geboren. Er hat 1136 in Oostvoorne, Holland, Niederlande Hadewich van Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juni 1156 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Beveren-Leie, Waregem, West-Flandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne è nato il nel 1108 nel Kallo, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio come figlio di Hugo II van Voorne e Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck. Lui sposato Hadewich van Holland nel 1136, nel Oostvoorne, Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 giugno 1156, nel Beveren-Leie, Waregem, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Beveren-Leie, Waregem, West Flanders, Be: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンワーエジェムベバーエン-レイ
ja.Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドオオストボオルン
ja.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorneは1108年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンカロでHugo II van VoorneとUnarchsdr van Naaldwijckの息子として生まれた。1136年にオランダホーランドオオストボオルンでHadewich van Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1156年6月25日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンワーエジェムベバーエン-レイで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne(은)는 1108년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 캘로에서 Hugo II van Voorne(와)과 Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1136년 네덜란드 홀랜드 스트보른에서 Hadewich van Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1156년 6월 25일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 워그 비버-레이에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Heeze-Leende, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Heeze-Leende, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne nasceu em 1108, em Kallo, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica filho de Hugo II van Voorne e Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck. Ele casou-se com Hadewich van Holland em 1136, em Oostvoorne, Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1156, em Beveren-Leie, Waregem, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne родился в 1108 г. в местности каллоу, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия. Его родителей звали Hugo II van Voorne и Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck. Он женился на женщине по имени Hadewich van Holland в 1136 г. в местности уствурн, холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 июня 1156 г. в местности бивирен-ли, варегем, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.Heeze-Leende, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Heeze-Leende, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Hugo III van Voorne nació en 1108, en Kallo, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica como hijo de Hugo II van Voorne y Unarchsdr van Naaldwijck. Se casó con Hadewich van Holland en 1136, en Oostvoorne, Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de junio de 1156, en Beveren-Leie, Waregem, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 48 años.
